subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: General — Pumps and pipework that form part of an air-conditioning system must either—

ol.li: achieve a pump motor power per unit of flowrate lower than the pump motor power per unit of flowrate achieved when applying (2), (3), (4), (5), (6) and (7) together.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Where the pump motor power input at the duty point is greater than 750 W, a pump must be capable of—

ol.li:
where serving a distributive system—
variable volume operation; and
variable pressure operation to the extent permitted by—
static head requirements; and
the requirements of downstream equipment.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A distributive system must not have—

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The requirements of (3)(b) do not apply to a distributive system with a single chiller, including a chiller used for space heating, that serves—

ol.li: air-conditioning systems with a total co-incident design load of less than 200 kW; or
only one heating coil or one cooling coil.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Circulator pumps — A glandless impeller pump, with a rated hydraulic power output of less than 2.5 kW and that is used in closed loop systems must have an energy efficiency index (EEI) not more than 0.27 calculated in accordance with European Union Commission Regulation No. 622/2012.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Other pumps — Pumps that are in accordance with Articles 1 and 2 of European Union Commission Regulation No. 547/2012 must have a minimum efficiency index (MEI) of 0.4 or more when calculated in accordance with European Union Commission Regulation No. 547/2012.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Pipework — Straight segments of pipework along the index run, forming part of an air-conditioning system—

ol.li:
in pipework systems that do not have branches and have the same flow rate throughout the entire pipe network, must achieve an average pressure drop of not more than—
for constant flow systems, the values nominated in Table J6D8a; or
for variable flow systems, the values nominated in Table J6D8b; or

in any other pipework system, must achieve an average pressure drop of not more than—
for constant flow systems, the values nominated in Table J6D8c; or
for variable flow systems, the values nominated in Table J6D8d.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The requirements of (7) do not apply—

ol.li: where the smallest pipe size compliant with (7) results in a velocity of 0.7 m/s or less at design flow.
